site.title: MoS-T — Modeling Spatio-Temporal Series
site.description: ANR Project MoS-T: Modeling Spatio-Temporal Series using graphs and graph neural networks.

hero.subtitle: Modeling Spatio-Temporal Series
hero.description: ANR Project (2022–2026) — Modeling spatio-temporal series using graphs and graph neural networks.

home.about_text: The MoS-T project aims to develop innovative methods for modeling spatio-temporal series based on graphs and graph neural networks (GNN). The goal is to propose generic approaches leveraging spatial and temporal relationships in data to improve prediction, classification, and anomaly detection.

research.title: Research
objectives: Propose graph models to represent spatio-temporal relationships in data
Develop GNN architectures tailored to spatio-temporal series
Validate the proposed approaches on real-world use cases (environment, health, transport)
research.wp1_desc: Development of methods to automatically construct graphs representing spatial and temporal relationships in data.
research.wp2_desc: Design of GNN architectures tailored to processing spatio-temporal series structured as graphs.
research.wp3_desc: Validation of the approaches on real use cases in the fields of environment, health, and transport.
